response: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) is renowned as the top-ranked university globally, consistently maintaining its position at #1. Founded in 1861, MIT boasts an impressive student body of 11,500 and a highly selective acceptance rate of just 3.9%. The annual tuition stands at $57,590, supported by a substantial endowment of $24.6 billion. With a dedicated faculty of 1,069 members, MIT has produced 98 Nobel laureates, underscoring its commitment to excellence in education and research.
